mapper.select: SELECT id, band_code, band_name, technology, frequency_mhz, duplex_mode, band_group FROM band_info ORDER BY technology, frequency_mhz
SELECT id, band_code, band_name, technology, frequency_mhz, duplex_mode, band_group FROM band_info WHERE technology = #{technology} ORDER BY frequency_mhz
SELECT id, band_code, band_name, technology, frequency_mhz, duplex_mode, band_group FROM band_info WHERE duplex_mode = #{duplexMode} ORDER BY technology, frequency_mhz
